title: AERS reviewer report with independence metadata (proposed extension)
description: Extends .agents/schemas/reviewer-report.schema.json with independence metadata that binds a review to a specific reviewer identity, harness/model family, and the exact candidate. Proposed for in-place adoption via docs/proposed-control-plane-change/.

candidate_sha.description: MUST equal the exact candidate; a review not bound to it is rejected

model_or_harness_family.description: e.g. distinct model/provider from the first reviewer

context_id.description: separate context; MUST differ from the author context

policy_digest.description: policy the review was performed under; bound for pinning
